hooks.command: /bin/sh -c 'root="${1-}"; shift; if [ -z "$root" ]; then echo "mobius:hook-misconfigured: PLUGIN_ROOT missing" >&2; exit 2; fi; if [ ! -d "$root" ]; then case "$root" in */.codex/plugins/cache/*/mobius/*) echo "mobius:hook-unavailable: installed plugin cache missing" >&2; exit 0 ;; esac; fi; exec /bin/sh "$root/scripts/mobius_hook_launcher.sh" "$root" "$@"' mobius-hook "${PLUGIN_ROOT}" hook pre-tool-use

/bin/sh -c 'root="${1-}"; shift; if [ -z "$root" ]; then echo "mobius:hook-misconfigured: PLUGIN_ROOT missing" >&2; exit 2; fi; if [ ! -d "$root" ]; then case "$root" in */.codex/plugins/cache/*/mobius/*) echo "mobius:hook-unavailable: installed plugin cache missing" >&2; exit 0 ;; esac; fi; exec /bin/sh "$root/scripts/mobius_hook_launcher.sh" "$root" "$@"' mobius-hook "${PLUGIN_ROOT}" hook stop
